summary: Frontend testing of NameTagEditor new features: Efternamn (last name), Telefonnummer (phone number) inputs, and colored motif icons. All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test cart item created with customization: child_name=TestNamn, last_name=TestEfternamn, phone_number=070-999 88 77
context_for_next_testing_agent: NameTagEditor new features verified: Efternamn, Telefonnummer inputs, colored motifs. Cart API correctly stores last_name and phone_number in customization.

frontend.text_tab_5_sections: ✓ Text tab shows 5 numbered sections: 1. Ange förnamn, 2. Ange efternamn, 3. Ange telefonnummer, 4. Välj typsnitt, 5. Välj typsnittsfärg
frontend.fornamn_input: ✓ Förnamn input [data-testid='child-name-input'] works and updates preview
frontend.efternamn_input: ✓ Efternamn input [data-testid='last-name-input'] works and shows in preview after förnamn
frontend.telefonnummer_input: ✓ Telefonnummer input [data-testid='phone-number-input'] works and shows below name in preview
frontend.preview_full_name: ✓ Preview shows full name (förnamn + efternamn) - e.g. 'Anna Svensson'
frontend.preview_phone: ✓ Preview shows phone number below name
frontend.motif_icons_colored: ✓ Motif icons are colored - Star=#FFD700 (gold), Heart=#E53935 (red)
frontend.small_grid_colored_motifs: ✓ Small grid preview uses colored motifs
frontend.add_to_cart_includes_new_fields: ✓ Add to cart includes last_name and phone_number in customization (verified via API)

verified_features.efternamn_input: ✓ New input field with data-testid='last-name-input', max 25 chars, marked as optional (valfritt)
verified_features.telefonnummer_input: ✓ New input field with data-testid='phone-number-input', max 20 chars, marked as optional (valfritt)
verified_features.colored_motifs: ✓ ALL_MOTIFS array has 'color' property per motif - icons render in their designated colors
verified_features.preview_updates: ✓ Main preview and small grid preview both update with full name and phone number
verified_features.cart_customization: ✓ Cart API stores: child_name, last_name, phone_number, font, font_color, motif, background
